thought.text: I will update the task tracker to mark the final task as done.

task_list.title: PRD integrity audit
task_list.notes: Analyze the PRD and UI prototype for consistency and gaps, then write .codalio/prd-integrity-report.json

task_list.title: Data model design
task_list.notes: Design the database schema, models, relationships, and multi-tenancy ownership

task_list.title: Permissions and Extras design
task_list.notes: Define roles, permissions, and identify Extras (custom policies, validations, etc.)

task_list.title: Screens and UI handoff mapping
task_list.notes: Map screens, routes, hooks, and actions, and write .codalio/ui-handoff.json if prototype exists

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"task_list": [{"title": "PRD integrity audit", "notes": "Analyze the PRD and UI prototype for consistency and gaps, then write .codalio/prd-integrity-report.json", "status": "done"}, {"title": "Data model design", "status": "done", "notes": "Design the database schema, models, relationships, and multi-tenancy ownership"}, {"status": "done", "notes": "Define roles, permissions, and identify Extras (custom policies, validations, etc.)", "title": "Permissions and Extras design"}, {"title": "Screens and UI handoff mapping", "notes": "Map screens, routes, hooks, and actions, and write .codalio/ui-handoff.json if prototype exists", "status": "done"}, {"title": "Acceptance criteria and remaining artifacts", "status": "done", "notes": "Generate acceptance-criteria.json, .rhino-plan.md, and .codalio/index.json"}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Mark all tasks as done", "command": "plan"}
